description: Letter of condolence from Yiṣḥaq b. Shelomo ha-Maskil to the brothers Binyamin and Yeshuʿa b. Shelomo. In Hebrew. Dated: Monday, 14 Heshvan 5571 AM, which is 1810 CE. Locations unclear, though possibly named on the page containing the address. This document may not be from the Cairo Geniza.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
